title: EQ - Select a value, put the app in background, return - the selected value stays
scenario: Verify that the selected EQ value persists after the app is backgrounded and then reopened for all EQ options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
steps: 1. Launch the app and navigate to the EQ settings.
2. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
3. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
4. Return to the app (e.g., tap the app icon or switch back).
5. Check that the selected EQ value is still displayed and active.
6. Repeat steps 1-5 for all remaining EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The selected EQ value persists after putting the app in the background and returning to it, for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
